title: Tariffs and Embargoes
description: Tariffs, embargoes, piracy, and wars alter costs and market volatility. Political events create trade disruptions. Players can exploit or suffer from these disruptions depending on their positioning and adaptability.
definition-of-done: Tariff system affecting trade between regions. Embargo system blocking certain goods/routes. War state increasing costs and risks. Events trigger economic disruptions.
testing-plan: Verify tariffs add costs correctly. Test embargoes block trade. Verify war effects on costs/risk. Test event-triggered disruptions.
